title: Reborn_Heroes
description: This Is A Palladium Addon That Brings Superpowers To Minecraft
body:
**This Is A Palladium Addon That Add Superpowers To Minecraft**


## The Powers Currently Obtainable In This Addon Are

**Metas**
- Gravity Manipulation
- Blindness
- Cryokinesis
- Mass Manipulation
- Light Manipulation
- Homelander
- Pyrokinesis
- Electric Kinetic Energy Conversion
- Virtual Mass Manipulation
- Radiation Host
- Sonic Scream
- Stormfront
- Aerokinesis
- Arachnid
- Speedforce


**Mutants**
- Solar Energy Absorbtion
- Vibration Manipulation
- Weather Manipulation
- Concussive Optic Blasts
- Rapid Regeneration X Claws
- Rapid Regeneration
- Aerodynamic Barrier
- Augmented Movement Potential
- Stockpile
- Magnetism


**Aliens/Hybrids**
- Bizzaro-Kryptonian
- Kree
- Kree-Hybrid
- Martian
- Viltrumite
- Half-Kryptonian
- Kryptonian


**Standalone**
- Amazonion
- Atleantean
- Protector Of Wakanda
- Gamma Radiation
- The Golden Sentry
- Umbrakinesis
- Shazam
- Super Soldier
- Silver Surfer
- Lord Of Order
- God Of Thunder
- Anti-Matter Manipulation

**Special Thanks To**
- _Red02 for coding the addon
- Fsang18, Hertz, Nexo, Spring, Speedy, Ben And Phantom For The Scripts They Provide In ThreeTag
- Thank You To Foily, Poke And Ezrys Who Spent Hours Modeling, Texturing And Playtesting This Addon To Give You Players A Great Experience
